items.title: Procter & Gamble: Resilient Business Facing Growth Headwinds
items.description: Procter & Gamble offers strong dividends and stability, but revenue stagnation and premium valuation limit upside. Check out why PG stock is a hold.

items.title: 'We haven't seen the worst of it': Retailers warn tariff impacts are far from over
items.description: Tariffs are driving up costs and straining consumers, leaving retailers from Walmart to Best Buy navigating an unpredictable spending environment.

items.description: Can this dividend titan recover to its former highs?
